labels: Significant interval worsening, consider worsening pneumonia, aspiration or edema.
report:
FINDINGS: Significant interval worsening of bilateral perihilar, lower lung opacities, with bronchovascular distribution, consider worsening pneumonia, aspiration or edema. Elevated right hemidiaphragm stable. Borderline heart size. Thoracolumbar curve.
IMPRESSION: Significant interval worsening, consider worsening pneumonia, aspiration or edema.
